name: deep-review
description: Stage-first deep review recipe: parallel review lenses, foreach validation of findings, and final evidence-backed synthesis for the runtime task.

tasks.prompt: Review runtime, scheduler, state, and concurrency correctness for the target described in the runtime task. Return JSON with a findings array. Each finding must include severity, title, evidence, rationale, and recommendedAction.

Review permission, tool, worktree, data-safety, and fail-closed behavior for the target described in the runtime task. Return JSON with a findings array. Each finding must include severity, title, evidence, rationale, and recommendedAction.

Review command UX, documentation, and product-contract fit for the target described in the runtime task. Return JSON with a findings array. Each finding must include severity, title, evidence, rationale, and recommendedAction.

each.prompt: Validate this proposed finding against repository evidence without using the original task as independent proof: ${item}. Return JSON with finding, verdict, evidence, and recommendedAction. verdict must be one of confirmed, partially-supported, unsupported, or needs-human-check.

stages.prompt: Use Source Stage Context and the runtime task to produce an evidence-backed deep review synthesis. Keep only findings with realistic impact and proportional fixes. Return JSON with summary, verdict, findings, risks, and recommendedNextAction.
